params.name: The Song of Roland
params.source: CIV Master Scroll (10.2%), Fragment Crafting (5.5%), Grandmaster Scroll (2.1%), Lottery Machine (0.24%), Master Scroll (1.9%), Wishing (0.2%)
params.description:
On Feb 11, 1837 AD, The Song of Roland, the oldest epic The Song of Roland, was finalized.

The more complete Oxford manuscript of the epic poem was handed over by Michel to the publisher. The poem has 290 verses and 4001 lines, and is written in colloquial Latin. The poem mainly talks about Charlemagne of France's attack on Spain. Ganelon the Nobel resented General Roland and conspired with the enemy to trick Roland and his army, who then died heroically in Anselva. Charlemagne avenged Roland b …
